validation_command: python -c "import subprocess,sys,re; r=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','pytest','tests/training/invariants/','-q','--no-header','-p','no:warnings','--tb=no'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='Hb Track - Backend'); m_pass=re.search(r'(\d+) passed',r.stdout); m_fail=re.search(r'(\d+) failed',r.stdout); passed=int(m_pass.group(1)) if m_pass else 0; failed=int(m_fail.group(1)) if m_fail else 0; assert failed<=126, f'FAIL AR_142: REGRESSAO {failed}>126'; assert passed>=1, f'FAIL AR_142: zero testes passaram'; print(f'PASS AR_142: {passed} passed {failed} failed baseline_ok')"
